summary: Channel Health Dashboard v2 testing complete. All 3 new API endpoints working correctly. Frontend dashboard renders with all new features: Field KPIs with period-over-period comparison, historical trend charts (Recharts), period selector. All REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL references verified replaced with VITE_BACKEND_URL.

issues: i18n translation keys showing instead of translated text (common.email, common.password, auth.hotel) - appears to be a known i18n initialization issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend channel_health_aggregator.py correctly implements compute_channel_health, compute_channel_health_trends, and compute_field_kpis functions
Dashboard router correctly exposes all 3 endpoints: /channel-health, /channel-health/trends, /channel-health/field-kpis
Frontend ChannelHealthDashboard.jsx properly implements Recharts trend charts with p50/p95/p99 latency lines
Field KPI cards correctly show current/previous/delta/trend with proper Turkish labels (saat, mudahale, issues)
Period selector buttons (24s, 3g, 7g, 30g) correctly map to hours (24, 72, 168, 720)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
CI/CD yml file uses VITE_BACKEND_URL correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Channel Health Dashboard v2 fully verified. Three API endpoints working: GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health (returns push_latency, sync_metrics, failure_breakdown, reconciliation_drift, retry_metrics, provider_sla), GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/trends (returns time-bucketed historical data), GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/field-kpis (returns 5 KPIs with period-over-period comparison). Frontend renders at /control-plane with tab data-testid='tab-channel-health'. All REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL references replaced with VITE_BACKEND_URL.

GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health.returns: push_latency (p50/p95/p99), sync_metrics, failure_breakdown, reconciliation_drift, retry_metrics, provider_sla, period_hours, calculated_at

GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/tr.returns: buckets array with time-series data, bucket_size_hours, period_hours, total_buckets
GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/tr.bucket_size_validation: hours=24 returns bucket_size=1h, hours=168 returns bucket_size=12h

GET /api/ops/dashboard/channel-health/fi.returns: sync_success, drift_reduction, mttr_hours, operator_interventions, push_sla_compliance - each with current/previous/delta/trend/unit

frontend_elements.chart-sync-drift-trend: PASS - Sync Basari & Drift Trendi chart
frontend_elements.kpi-push-latency: PASS - Push Latency p95 summary card
